mnemonics: CREATE USER IS LIKE building a HOUSE, FOUNDATION IS USER, WALLS ARE PRIVILEGES, ROOF IS AUTHORIZATION
keyPoints: CREATE USER: To create a user in MySQL, use the CREATE USER statement.
GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES: Use the GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES statement to grant all permissions to the user.
Example Syntax: CREATE USER 'user_name'@'%' IDENTIFIED BY 'password'; GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON *.* TO 'user_name'@'%';
